mem_1779966511817_9034305042924608095.content: User plan: $20/month MiniMax, 4500 requests per 5 hours. Rate = 900 req/hora. Typical session (2 hrs active) = 1800 requests. Can do ~2.5 full sessions per 5h window. Current session (dolphin) used 31 requests in 18h = 1.7 req/hr (paused).

mem_1779966033774_3128198603921172667.content: jcode internal latency (harness overhead): ~50-100ms typical for agent processing. Tool calls: echo/date <1ms, bash 20-70ms, file ops 50-100ms, memory 333ms, GitHub API 700-2000ms. This is negligible compared to MiniMax API latency (~1000-3000ms).
mem_1779966033774_3128198603921172667.search_text: jcode internal latency (harness overhead) ~50 100ms typical for agent processing tool calls echo date <1ms, bash 20 70ms, file ops 50 100ms, memory 333ms, github api 700 2000ms this is negligible compared to minimax api latency (~1000 3000ms) benchmark jcode latency performance internal

mem_1779966166691_4351502234994057551.content: jcode is fastest harness: Time to first input 48.7ms vs Claude Code 3512.8ms (72x faster), vs Codex CLI 905.8ms (18x faster), vs pi 596.4ms (12x faster). jcode internal latency (~50-100ms) is comparable to its benchmark.

mem_1779966225371_17668876118266606226.content: jcode compile optimization roadmap: Target warm cargo check <5s (current ~8.5s), self-dev build <20-30s (current ~47s). Bottlenecks: src/agent.rs (30.9s selfdev build), src/tool/browser.rs (13.7s cargo check). Already split: jcode-embedding, jcode-pdf, jcode-provider-core, jcode-message-types, jcode-tool-types. Next: more crate splits, config-based customization to avoid recompilation.

mem_1779966371276_18194654207850659194.content: MiniMax cost comparison: MiniMax-M2.7 ~$0.10-0.20/1M input tokens vs Claude $3/1M (15-30x cheaper) vs GPT-4o $2.50/1M (12-25x cheaper) vs Gemini Flash $0.10/1M (similar). For typical 15K token conversation: MiniMax ~$0.0015 vs Claude ~$0.045.
